liveDeliveryFieldset.materializeWarningPre: Each poll recomputes this view. For frequent polling, check
liveDeliveryFieldset.materializeWarningPost: so polls read the stored table.
liveDeliveryFieldset.mechanismPushMid: change stream to subscribers. Inbound detection is set by
liveDeliveryFieldset.mechanismPushPost: above — no watermark or poll interval here.
liveDeliveryFieldset.mechanismAppendPost: — each interval fetches rows past MAX(watermark).
liveDeliveryFieldset.mechanismReplace: Full-replace poll — no watermark column, so each poll re-scans and the output content-hash suppresses unchanged results. Suits small or non-monotonic tables.
liveDeliveryFieldset.watermarkColumnTooltip: Pick the monotonic change column to append rows past MAX(watermark). Leave as 'None' to full-replace each poll — the output content-hash suppresses unchanged results.
liveDeliveryFieldset.pollIntervalTooltip: How often the live stream re-checks the source and pushes changes to subscribers (SSE/Kafka sink). Independent of the MV Refresh Interval (which rebuilds the stored table for queries) and Cache TTL (which caches query results).
liveDeliveryFieldset.pollFasterWarning: Polling faster than the {{seconds}}s refresh interval re-reads unchanged data — the materialized table only changes on refresh.
liveDeliveryFieldset.debeziumNote: Debezium transport is configured on the source. No extra per-table config.
liveDeliveryFieldset.kafkaNote: Kafka feed is configured on the source; set the topic this table consumes below.
liveDeliveryFieldset.nativeNote: Native change stream requires no extra per-table config.
